---
name: Sprint
about: Define and track an autonomous sprint
title: "S-NNN: "
labels: sprint
---

## Sprint Metadata
- **Priority:** P[0/1/2/3]
- **Duration:** [estimate]
- **Layer:** [L1-L4]
- **Product:** [DCC / Career Coach / Clarity / HAL Stack / etc.]
- **Maturity Stage:** [1-5]
- **Story refs:** [S1.1, S5.6, etc.]

## Prompt

```
AUTONOMOUS SPRINT — [TITLE]
Repo: C:\twobirds\[repo]\
Read SESSION-STATE.md before starting. Commit after each phase.

PHASE 0 — PROCESS PENDING CAPTURES (mandatory)
[standard Phase 0]

PHASE 1 — [description]
[details]

FINAL STEP: Update SESSION-STATE.md, push to master.
```

## Expected Outputs
- [ ] [file or deliverable]
- [ ] [file or deliverable]

## Standards Checklist
- [ ] HTML: semantic elements, heading hierarchy, alt text, linked labels
- [ ] CSS: tokens.css variables, mobile-first
- [ ] Accessibility: WCAG AA, 44px tap targets, focus indicators
- [ ] Performance: page weight < 500KB, no render-blocking JS
- [ ] SEO: title, meta description, canonical, OG tags
- [ ] Security: no secrets, CSP, SRI on CDN scripts
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing)
